title: Pebblits
description: A mod created specifically to be ruined by Knarfy's audience. What could go wrong?
body:
# Knarfy's Ruined Minecraft Mod 2
Knarfy created a Minecraft mod with a set of simple features. This mod was then shown to his YouTube audience... and that went well.
The features suggested by his audience were then coded into the game... so of course this mod is insane.

### Check out the original YouTube video here: 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/se1pcr_88NA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


### A few of the included features are as follows:
 - Pebblits
    - Drops Pebbles (that sometimes explode when thrown)
      - Hit it with a pickaxe for even more pebbles
    - Shearable Eyes
    - You can add more eyes
    - Rabbits feet give them ears
    - Moss blocks give them an afro
    - Gray wool makes their eyebrows HUGE
- Pebblit Variants
  - Magmalit
  - Uraniumlit
  - Giantlit
  - Sandlit
  - Goldlit
  - Obsidianlit
  - Bufflit
  - TNTlit
  - _All variants are obtainable in creative mode, but some are also available in survival. Watch the original YouTube video for more information on features and obtaining!_
- Frozen Pebblit Blocks
  - Mine this to get a pebblit

**Disclaimer: PLEASE don't use this mod on a world you like!! It can and will completely destroy your Minecraft world.**
